---
title: identical-ifelseif-branches
description: "Detect repeated if-chain branches."
---

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-check-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

**Default severity:** 🟡 `warning`

Detect repeated if-chain branches. Strider default: enabled.

## Bad

```go
if first { run() } else if second { run() }
```

## Good

```go
if first { one() } else if second { two() }
```

## Enable

This optional check runs when selected with `--only identical-ifelseif-branches`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all`.
